历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 24508 → 19205 → 26949 → 26440 → 31807, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (ranking numbers increasing), with a cumulative shift of about 4900 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 31807, the highest ranking in the past 5 years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 86 in 2021, 79 in 2022, 77 in 2023, 49 in 2024, and 56 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 53, a decrease of 3 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 5.4%, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 48th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with recent rankings stable in the 44–53 range, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly positive, mainly due to the high popularity of its education field (estimated master's degree applicants exceeding 15,000); Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 67th (average), with moderate short video exposure, and no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps recorded; it has A+ in Marxist Theory, A+ in Education, A+ in World History, A in Statistics, A- in Biology, and A- in Ecology, with 6 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating outstanding disciplinary strength among 211 normal universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for teacher training/education majors shows divergent wait-and-see attitudes (2024 popularity index 55.84), while engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information continue to be highly popular; the total number of Hebei Province college entrance examination takers in 2026 is approximately 609,800, a slight increase from 2025 (606,800), with an estimated 364,000 Physics Category candidates, expanding the competition base; Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, relatively close to Hebei Province, and is a high-quality normal university in the Northeast region, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Hebei candidates; the university's enrollment scale in Hebei Province is moderate, with Physics Category plans fluctuating between 49 and 86 in recent years.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 31807, the slight reduction in the 2026 Physics Category plan (53 vs. 56) which decreases the ranking number by about 1022, the slight increase in the total number of Hebei candidates intensifying competition, and the slightly positive reputation of the university attracting applicants, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 30755, with a range of 30255–31255.
